content.swara: kamala nAbha nee pada kamalamE SaraNu ||
tiru venkaTagiri dEvA SaraNu  ||
kamala nAbha nee pada kamalamE SaraNu ||
content.sahitya: You are like the Sun (“kamalAsatee”) to your lotus faced (“mukha Kamala”) consort Kamala..

content.swara: tiru venkaTagiri dEvA SaraNu  ||
content.sahitya: You are the ultimate destination (“bhAga dhEya”) to the supreme (“parama”) sages (“yOgijana”).
